/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/hevc_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/nal_unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/sps_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/pps_parser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/frame_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/macroblock_analyzer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/hevc_analyzer.dir/src/vps_parser.cpp.o -o bin/hevc_analyzer
